real_interview.content: IntroV4Confirmation (hi i'm ellie thanks for coming in today i was created to talk to people in a safe and secure environment i'm not a therapist but i'm here to learn about people and would love to learn about you i'll ask a few questions to get us started and please feel free to tell me anything your answers are totally confidential are you ok with this)
how_doingV (so how are you doing today)
when_LA (when did you move to l_a)
often_backB (how often do you go back to your hometown)
compares_LA (how does it compare to l_a)
tell_about_that (can you tell me about that)
l_a is a lot more fun
why_LA (why did you move to l_a)
hard_decision (how did you decide to do that)
uh when i was young it was all that i wanted to do
is uh an actor on an h_b_o series
travel_shoes (i'm sure you can tell by my shoes i'm not much of a world explorer do you travel a lot)
travel_changed (what do you enjoy about traveling)
meeting new people eating new food
travel_trips (i'd love to hear about one of your trips)
i don't really feel like talking about it
shyoutgoing (do you consider yourself more shy or outgoing)
<deep breath> uh i can be shy at times i could be outgoing maybe a little bit of both
relax_fishtank (sometimes when i'm feeling tense i turn on the fish tank screensaver hey i know it's not hawaii but it's the best i've got what do you do to relax)
uh just take a deep breath or maybe do some reading
control_temper (how are you at controlling your temper)
last_argument (when was the last time you argued with someone and what was it about)
uh wow it was maybe about two months ago
my brother and i were arguing over rent payments
family_relationship (tell me about your relationship with your family)
feelguilty (what's something you feel guilty about)
can't really say i don't really feel guilty often
memory_erase (tell me about an event or something that you wish you could erase from your memory)
i don't really have anything that i'd like to erase from my memory
mad_makeyou (what are some things that make you really mad)
situation_handled (tell me about a situation that you wish you had handled differently)
that i wish i would've handled differently
i don't really feel like discussing that
hard_decisionB (tell me about the hardest decision you've ever had to make)
well i'm kind of in the midst of it right now i don't know whether i want to uh move to new york
or to stay in l_a so it's a it's a tough decision
change_directions (what made you decide to do that)
talk_later (why don't we talk about that later)
easy_sleep (how easy is it for you to get a good night's sleep)
sleep_affects (what are you like when you don't sleep well)
i am sensitive i am uh vulnerable
feel_lately (how have you been feeling lately)
as of late i've been feeling pretty well can't complain
behavior_changes (have you noticed any changes in your behavior or thoughts lately)
ptsd_diagnosed (have you ever been diagnosed with p_t_s_d)
depression_diagnosed (have you been diagnosed with depression)
happy_lasttime (tell me about the last time you felt really happy)
last time i felt really really happy
i had a real nice date about a month ago
and we had a good time and i was real happy that day and the day after
tell_about_that (can you tell me about that)
uh well i uh it was a young girl that i had met a couple years ago and we finally uh
were available to uh go out and hang out we went and had some wine at a wine bar and then we went and had dinner
and that was the date had a great time
ideal_weekendC (tell me how you spend your ideal weekend)
my ideal weekend well i like to watch english league soccer
and uh sometimes i if i'm in philly i spend time with my family on weekends if not
i'll just hang out with my brother or
just really laid back and chill
advice_back (what advice would you give to yourself ten or twenty years ago)
<deep breath> ten or twenty years ago what advice would i give myself i would say um
self_change (what are some things you wish you could change about yourself)
maybe wish i was a little more outgoing
feelbadly (tell me about a time when someone made you feel really badly about yourself)
i really can't remember a time i i've always felt really good people's
the <th> whatever people have to say about me really doesn't change
BF_describe (how would your best friend describe you)
he would say that uh very warm
influence_positive (who's someone that's been a positive influence in your life)
tell_about_that (can you tell me about that)
he's <s> a very <ver> he's a man of few words
and um very warm very loving man
and uh he's a gentleman has a great sense of style and he's a great cook
Ellie17Dec2012_08 (what are you most proud of in your life)
was a series regular on the wire couple years ago in the last season
asked_everything (okay i think i have asked everything i need to)
appreciate_open (thanks for sharing your thoughts with me)
